mapper.select: SELECT rental_id, rental_date, inventory_id, customer_id, return_date, staff_id, last_update FROM rental ORDER BY rental_date DESC
SELECT rental_id, rental_date, inventory_id, customer_id, return_date, staff_id, last_update FROM rental WHERE rental_id = #{rentalId}

SELECT r.rental_id, r.rental_date, r.inventory_id, r.customer_id, r.return_date, r.staff_id, r.last_update FROM rental r JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id WHERE r.return_date IS NULL AND r.rental_date + (f.rental_duration || ' days')::INTERVAL < now() ORDER BY r.rental_date
SELECT rental_id, rental_date, inventory_id, customer_id, return_date, staff_id, last_update FROM rental WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY rental_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental (rental_date, inventory_id, customer_id, return_date, staff_id, last_update) VALUES (#{rentalDate}, #{inventoryId}, #{customerId}, #{returnDate}, #{staffId}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now())) RETURNING rental_id
mapper.update: UPDATE rental SET return_date = #{returnDate}, last_update = now() WHERE rental_id = #{rentalId} AND return_date IS NULL
mapper.select: WITH monthly_rentals AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', r.rental_date)::date AS month, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count, COUNT(r.return_date) AS return_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.return_date IS NULL) AS still_rented, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM COALESCE(r.return_date, now()) - r.rental_date)), 1) AS avg_rental_days, SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue FROM rental r LEFT JOIN payment p ON r.rental_id = p.rental_id WHERE r.rental_date >= #{startDate} AND r.rental_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', r.rental_date) ) SELECT month, rental_count, return_count, still_rented, avg_rental_days, total_revenue, LAG(rental_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month_rentals, CASE WHEN LAG(rental_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND( (rental_count - LAG(rental_count) OVER (ORDER BY month))::numeric / NULLIF(LAG(rental_count) OVER (ORDER BY month), 0) * 100, 2) END AS growth_pct FROM monthly_rentals ORDER BY month
